https://www.playstation.com/games/2xko

Delightful agony awaits. Thresh joins 2XKO on June 9. Play free on PlayStation 5.

2XKO is a free-to-play fighting game from Riot Games, the studio behind VALORANT and League of Legends. Fight solo or with a friend in explosive 2v2 showdowns, mastering a range of powerful champion abilities and unique tag mechanics to take down the enemy duo.

text:
Destiny 2 - Monument of Triumph Update Launch Trailer | PS5, PS4 & PC Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/destiny-2/

Build your Monument of Triumph.

Play new and updated content including Pantheon, Sparrow Racing League, Distortions, and new Triumph pursuits celebrating your Guardian’s journey across Destiny 2.

New challenges, abilities, and rewards arrive for all Guardians on June 9, 2026.

⚪ https://bung.ie/mot_link

FOLLOW DESTINY:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DestinyTheGame
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/destinythegame
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/destinythegame

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Bungie/
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/bungie
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bungie/
⠀ ⠀ ⠀ ⠀
Dive into the free-to-play world of Destiny 2 to experience responsive first-person shooter combat, explore the mysteries of our solar system, and unleash elemental abilities against powerful enemies. Create your Guardian and collect unique weapons, armor, and gear to customize your look and playstyle. Experience Destiny 2’s cinematic story alone or with friends, join other Guardians for challenging co-op missions, or compete against them in a variety of PvP modes.

The skies over Strangereal are as dangerous as they are beautiful. Equip yourself with the knowledge and munitions needed to embody the Wings of Theve – whether you’re already an ace pilot or a rookie taking flight for the first time.

ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE releases October 2nd, 2026!
Pre-order now to unlock the F-14A aircraft and exclusive access to ACE COMBAT ZERO: THE BELKAN WAR: https://www.playstation.com/games/ace-combat-8-wings-of-theve/

The Deluxe Edition of ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE includes:

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Tour de France 2026 - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017761

Get ready to fight for the Yellow Jersey: Tour de France 2026 is available now!

Ride through sun, rain, mud and chaos in Tour de France 2026, where every stage can change in an instant. Experience new licensed races, revamped Team Time Trial gameplay, dynamic weather, and the official 2026 Tour route featuring iconic locations like the Sagrada Família and Montmartre.
Master slippery descents, brutal climbs and tactical peloton battles across 113 playable stages.

Play now on PlayStation 5.

#ps5 #ps5games #tourdefrance #tourdefrance2026

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The 7th Guest Remake - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019061

The 7th Guest Remake is out now on PlayStation 5.

Six guests. One mansion. And something watching from within.

Step inside the legendary Stauf mansion, where six guests have been invited under mysterious circumstances. Explore its shifting corridors, transforming rooms, and hidden secrets as you solve increasingly complex puzzles and uncover the truth behind the enigmatic toy maker Henry Stauf.

Nearly three decades after the original helped define early interactive storytelling, The 7th Guest Remake rebuilds Henry Stauf’s infamous mansion from the ground up with updated visuals, redesigned puzzles, and newly recorded volumetric video performances that places you directly inside the story.

Available now on PlayStation 5.

Owners of The 7th Guest VR on PlayStation VR2 receive the remake at no additional cost at launch. Players who purchase The 7th Guest Remake on PlayStation 5 also gain free access to The 7th Guest VR on PlayStation VR2.

#ps5 #ps5games
